---
title: "Digital literacy reduces susceptibility to populist content on social media"
subtitle: Replication data and code
format: 
  html:
    embed-resources: true
author: Kristina Aleksandrovna Pedersen, Ferdinand Geissler, Felix Hartmann, Johannes Giesecke, Macartan Humphreys, Heike Klüver
---

We provide files to replicate all analyses and tables for "Digital literacy reduces susceptibility to populist content on social media"

1. [Data preparation and checks](1_data_prep.html) code
2. data (`.rds`) files: [wave_9](data/wave_9.rds) [wave_10](data/wave_10.rds)
3. [Code used for video treatment preparation](https://github.com/wzb-ipi/digital-literacy/tree/main/pre_survey_prep)
4. All results and [Replication code](2_analysis.html)
